changelog.change: v0.6.0 restructure: split into chunks/ and index/ files

v0.9.0 session 9: KB cleanup completed, all missing indexes created, tombstones deleted, frameworks chunk created from archive. Roadmap problems resolved — P5b/P5 reordered, P3 exit condition corrected, risks assigned to phases, P6 binary gate declared, test domain changed from MNIST to arithmetic/equations, input encoding decided (binary tree per value node, seed rule bootstrap). behaviour_personality, workflow, session_lock chunks added. Framing bias and premature recommendation failure patterns documented. Context governance framework established with soft ceilings and lock protocol.
